filament.template: Create a new Filament feature: Model, Migration, Resource, Tests. Follow rules in ~/.config/opencode/kb/global/rules/01-tall-stack.md

seed.template: Generate Laravel Factories with realistic relational data using Faker

debug.template: Debug application errors. Read storage/logs/laravel.log, analyze stack trace, propose fix following rules in ~/.config/opencode/kb/global/rules/01-tall-stack.md

audit-db.template: Audit database schema for missing indexes, N+1 queries, normalization issues. Do NOT modify existing migrations.

test.template: Run the full test suite with coverage. Show failures and suggest fixes.

make-migration.template: Create a new Laravel migration following database rules in ~/.config/opencode/kb/global/rules/01-tall-stack.md

make-service.template: Create a new Laravel Service class with proper structure

make-observer.template: Create a new Eloquent Observer following Laravel conventions

make-policy.template: Create a Laravel Policy for authorization

make-job.template: Create a Laravel Job class (queued or synchronous)

sys-update.template: Update Arch Linux system packages using pacman/yay. Check news first with pacman -Pn.

sys-service.template: Manage systemd services. Use systemctl for start/stop/enable/disable/status.

sys-packages.template: Install or remove packages with pacman or yay (AUR). Search first.

sys-logs.template: Read system logs with journalctl. Show errors or specific service logs.

sys-stats.template: Check system resource usage: CPU, memory, disk, processes. Use htop for interactive.
